网赌快3导师.【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239061376_64082607<br>vk.com/topic-239049065_63664786<br>vk.com/topic-239079492_64358637<br>vk.com/topic-238990209_64519142<br>vk.com/topic-239061360_64825783<br>vk.com/topic-238994714_63747412<br>vk.com/topic-239015655_63664796<br>vk.com/topic-239015697_65188951<br>vk.com/topic-239049155_63664801<br>vk.com/topic-239015733_63942626<br>vk.com/topic-239051192_64358654<br>vk.com/topic-238994514_63747420<br>vk.com/topic-239052631_65403082<br>vk.com/topic-239058873_63942628<br>vk.com/topic-239059201_65403085<br>vk.com/topic-239049398_64250262<br>vk.com/topic-239061285_63664805<br>vk.com/topic-239061371_65403086<br>vk.com/topic-239026624_63747425<br>vk.com/topic-239049062_64358659<br>vk.com/topic-239043362_64358662<br>vk.com/topic-239052623_63942634<br>vk.com/topic-239048284_63747430<br>vk.com/topic-239066392_64358664<br>vk.com/topic-239079486_64082638<br>vk.com/topic-239015683_63942637<br>vk.com/topic-238981889_64519167<br>vk.com/topic-239066445_63664817<br>vk.com/topic-239052611_65403092<br>vk.com/topic-239049094_63747437<br>vk.com/topic-239004246_64082649<br>vk.com/topic-239015655_63664823<br>vk.com/topic-239028909_64519171<br>vk.com/topic
